description: A real candid photograph of a very large American flag hung vertically (stars in the upper-left canton, red and white stripes running down) against the concrete facade of a government building, likely the Department of Labor / Frances Perkins Building, under a clear sky. The flag's fabric shows natural folds and creases and the building's windows and stone panels are visible behind and around it. There is no on-image text, logo, or designed overlay. The tweet caption 'Stand strong, Patriots' frames this patriotic display, but the image itself is a plain photograph with no added graphic design.
